name: What if symptoms delayed years after work exposure in Saint George?
description: Yes, if linked to work and timely filed.[3]

mainEntity.name: What if symptoms delayed years after work exposure in Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if linked to work and timely filed.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Still compensable if work caused, filed within limits from manifestation.[3] Cases recognize latent occupational diseases.[3] Key factors: (1) causation despite delay; (2) no new causes; (3) timely post-discovery. Retroactively document exposure. Expert timelines key. Viable claims exist.
